noticia.titulo: Movie Review: Coven Of The Black Cube
noticia.texto_resumido: Rate This MovieCoven Of The Black Cube Movie Review by Matt Boiselle Coven Of The Black Cube – directed by Brewce Longo (writer credit as well), and co-written by Zoe Angeli & Josh Schafer, and starring Morrigan Thomson-Milam, Tina Krause and Joe Swanberg Synopsis: In this heavy metal queer-romance cursed by black magic and the … The post Movie Review: Coven Of The Black Cube appeared first on Horror News | HNN .
